'''gayava''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pycnosome|pycnosome]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| g-y-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pycnosome|pycnosome]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| gayava
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:gæyævæth|gæyævæth]] || [[word:gæyævæj|gæyævæj]] || [[word:gæyævæsh|gæyævæsh]] || [[word:gæyævæ|gæyævæ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:gayayavath|gayayavath]] || [[word:gayayavaj|gayayavaj]] || [[word:gayayavash|gayayavash]] || [[word:gayayava|gayayava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:gayavath|gayavath]] || [[word:gayavaj|gayavaj]] || [[word:gayavash|gayavash]] || [[word:gayava|gayava]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:gayafvath|gayafvath]] || [[word:gayafvaj|gayafvaj]] || [[word:gayafvash|gayafvash]] || [[word:gayafvaf|gayafvaf]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:gayavatha|gayavatha]] || [[word:gayavaja|gayavaja]] || [[word:gayavasha|gayavasha]] || [[word:gayavaka|gayavaka]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:gayavath|gayavath]] || [[word:gayavaj|gayavaj]] || [[word:gayavash|gayavash]] || [[word:gayava|gayava]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:gayavathal|gayavathal]] || [[word:gayavajal|gayavajal]] || [[word:gayavashal|gayavashal]] || [[word:gayavakal|gayavakal]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:gayavathatha|gayavathatha]] || [[word:gayavajaja|gayavajaja]] || [[word:gayavashasha|gayavashasha]] || [[word:gayavaka|gayavaka]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:gayavathan|gayavathan]] || [[word:gayavajan|gayavajan]] || [[word:gayavashan|gayavashan]] || [[word:gayavakan|gayavakan]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:gayavathaoro|gayavathaoro]] || [[word:gayavajaoro|gayavajaoro]] || [[word:gayavashaoro|gayavashaoro]] || [[word:gayavakaoro|gayavakaoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|0c0cba0}}
